title: Betfred World Matchplay 2026 Coverage from Sky Sports and BBC
description: According to reports, the 2026 Betfred World Matchplay is taking place in Blackpool, featuring players like Luke Humphries, Gerwyn Price, and Luke Littler.

sections.heading: Tournament Updates
paragraphs: According to Sky Sports, the 2026 World Matchplay is featuring Luke Humphries and Gerwyn Price in Blackpool. The source provides updates, video, commentary, scores, analysis, and results regarding the event.

sections.heading: Title Defence
paragraphs: BBC reports that Luke Littler has started his title defence with a win over Niko Springer at the World Matchplay Darts 2026.

sections.heading: Live Scores and Results
paragraphs: The PDC has released information regarding the 2026 Betfred World Matchplay, specifically covering day three. Their coverage includes darts live scores, results, and ticket information.

sections.heading: Search Trend Context
paragraphs: The search term 'betfred' has a lower bound of 2000 reported searches in the GB region. Google Trends identifies popular queries by analyzing the search terms entered into Google across all categories.

faq.q: Who is competing in the 2026 World Matchplay according to Sky Sports?
faq.a: Sky Sports reports that Luke Humphries and Gerwyn Price are featuring in the event taking place in Blackpool.

faq.q: How did Luke Littler perform in the tournament?
faq.a: According to the BBC, Luke Littler started his title defence with a win over Niko Springer.

faq.a: The PDC provides darts live scores, results, and ticket information for the 2026 Betfred World Matchplay.
